events.description: Multiplayer deep-dive (companion to task-052 AI, task-053 Movement). Diagnosis: multiplayer is fundamentally broken at the architectural level — lockstep transport works, but the simulation it tries to lock runs on local frame time, command kinds bypass lockstep entirely, and the checksum-mismatch handler is empty {}. 12 verified findings + 5 architectural smells. Confirmed 2 of task-051's 3 unverified critical claims (Ability case missing; Time.deltaTime drives ticks); refuted 1 (SpawnPlacementHelper deterministic CreateFromIndex was misread as UnityEngine.Random by surface scan). Recommendation: either deprioritize multiplayer or commit to architectural rework (many-week scope).
